mapper.sql: incomePayDetailId, userId, orderNo, transactionNumber, payType, money, tradeDate, tradeType, openId, tradeStatus, checkedTime, transactionTime, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into income_pay_detail (incomePayDetailId, userId, orderNo, transactionNumber, payType, money, tradeDate, tradeType, openId, tradeStatus, checkedTime, transactionTime, createdDate) values (#{incomePayDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transactionNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{tradeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{tradeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{checkedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{transactionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into income_pay_detail
incomePayDetailId,
userId,
orderNo,
transactionNumber,
payType,
money,
tradeDate,
tradeType,
openId,
tradeStatus,
storeId,
checkedTime,
transactionTime,
createdDate,
anotherId,
#{incomePayDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{transactionNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{payType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE},

#{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tradeStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},

#{transactionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{anotherId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update:
update income_pay_detail
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transactionNumber = #{transactionNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
payType = #{payType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
money = #{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
tradeDate = #{tradeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
tradeType = #{tradeType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tradeStatus = #{tradeStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
checkedTime = #{checkedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
transactionTime = #{transactionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where incomePayDetailId = #{incomePayDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update income_pay_detail set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, transactionNumber = #{transactionNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payType = #{payType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, money = #{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, tradeDate = #{tradeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, tradeType = #{tradeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tradeStatus = #{tradeStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, checkedTime = #{checkedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, transactionTime = #{transactionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where incomePayDetailId = #{incomePayDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into income_pay_detail (incomePayDetailId, userId, orderNo, transactionNumber, payType, money, tradeDate, tradeType, openId, tradeStatus, checkedTime, transactionTime, createdDate) values (#{incomePayDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transactionNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{tradeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{tradeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{checkedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{transactionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: select payType, (select constant from constant where cId =1 and ckey = payType) as typeName, case when payType = 6 then '+' when payType = 8 then '+' when payType = 9 then '+' when payType = 11 then '+' else '-' end as moneyType, concat(money,'') as money, date_format(tradeDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as tradeDate, tradeType from income_pay_detail where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by tradeDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from income_pay_detail where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
